===================
===================
=== BOB DYLAN - Guitar Legends EXPO '92 DVD & Audio_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - Guitar Legends EXPO '92 October 17th 1991 "Transfers From Master Stereo VHS, JTT" " DVD & Audio Versions"

=============================================

This Audio Version is an offered as an Upgrade to:

http://www.hungercity.org/details.php?id=5904

=============================================

Excellent Quality Audio & Video

I assumed this was widely circulated so have never bothered with it

Copies of "THIS CAPTURE" have never been circulated in "ANY" form 

Guitar Legends EXPO '92
Seville, Spain
October 17th 1991

DVD SOURCE: UK TV Broadcast > Panasonic NV-F65 HQ VHS (Scotch PRO120) > Sony RDR-HX 725 DVD Recorder (DVD+RW) SP > TMPGEnc 4.0 XPress > TMPGEnc DVD Author 3.0 > Video TS

AUDIO SOURCE: Line Out from Panasonic VHS Recorder > Soundforge 9 >
FLAC Level 6 Align on Sector Boundaries

VIDEO: Mpeg 2, PAL, 4x3, 720x576, 25fps, CBR, 4399 Kb/s
AUDIO: Linear PCM, 48000 Hz, Stereo, 1536 kb/s

Menu & Track Selection

Capture, Transfer & Authoring, JTT

01. All Along The Watchtower
02. Boots Of Spanish Leather
03. Across The Borderline
04. Answer Me
05. Shake, Rattle and Roll
06. I Can't Turn You Loose

JTT June 2009

PLEASE "DO NOT" CONVERT TO NTSC

===================
===================
===================
